items.title: Sunrise — Challenge Begins
items.description: First team on the water at sunrise. The clock starts — every kilometer counts toward your pledge total!

items.title: Check-in & Boat Rigging
items.description: Arrive early to check in, rig your boat, and get your team log sheet. Safety briefing at the dock.

items.title: Morning Rows Underway
items.description: Teams rotate on boats and ergs using the whole-lake flow pattern. Hand-tag all rower transitions.

items.title: Hourly Raffle Draw
items.description: First hourly raffle draw at the tarmac. Tickets available at the concession tent all day.

items.title: Midday BBQ & 50/50 Draw
items.description: Grab lunch from the BBQ. 50/50 draw announced at noon. Keep the kilometers rolling!

items.title: Afternoon Push
items.description: Halfway through sunset — teams dig deep. Music and community cheer keep the energy high.

items.title: Final Stretch Begins
items.description: Four hours to sunset. Final push for teams chasing Most Kilometers and Most Money Raised prizes.

items.title: Last Laps on the Lake
items.description: Golden hour on Elk Lake. Final erging and rowing to maximize your team's total distance.

items.title: Sunset — Challenge Complete!
items.description: Oars down at sunset. Official km totals recorded. Prizes awarded for Best Team Name, Most Kilometers, and Most Money Raised.

items.title: Prizes & Celebration
items.description: Prize presentations, final raffle draw, and community celebration. Thank you for rowing for a great cause!
